name: Name
info_type_menu: Menu type, e.g. main or dropdown
info_select_parent_menu: Parent menu if this is a submenu
info_select_link_type: Choose link type: external URL or internal page
info_code_coa: Unique account code, usually numeric and hierarchical (e.g. 1100 for Cash)
info_name_coa: Account name according to its function, e.g. Cash, Accounts Receivable, or Salary Expense.
info_type_coa: Account type based on accounting category: Assets, Liabilities, Equity, Revenue, or Expense.
info_parent_coa: Parent account (if any) to build hierarchical COA, e.g. "Cash" as the parent of "Petty Cash".
iinfo_date_journal: The date when the journal entry is recorded
info_reference_no_journal: The reference number or source document of
info_description_journal: General notes for this journal entry
